### FUTURE PREVIEW

### COMPOSITION INTENT FOR THIS CYCLE

Active act: First ascent toward the pivot (Energy builds stepwise. Warmth gathers — pale candlelight enters, an open palm appears in anticipation of the first tahwil. The line of moonlight widens.)
Cycle intent: A second text fragment — 'before the light fades' — at upper-center. Warm parchment edges into the palette via setBackground.
Energy hint: rising
